Moderated for this game for a couple months now. As an unbiased opinion, this is one of the best locomotion using games I’ve ever had. Active community, active updates, fun game modes, etc.

I really like this game I've been playing since it came out and so much fun throughout the updates and made a lot of friends community is really nice sometimes it can be questionable sometimes but so is every fan game. I recommend this game highly
